title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For February 2023
text: NOBL fell 4.12% in December, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 6.5%. Thus far this month, through January 25th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 1.92% and starting the year on a bright note.

title: Reasons to Retain West Pharmaceutical (WST) in Your Portfolio
text: West Pharmaceutical (WST) continues to gain momentum due to its strength in the Proprietary Products business. However, forex woes persist.

title: U.S. Wide-Moat Stocks On Sale: The January 2023 Heat Map
text: Our 3-step process focuses on wide-moat stocks (as per Morningstar's rating). We are only interested in those targets that are attractively valued in historical comparison.

title: West to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
text: EXTON, Pa. , Jan. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, today announced that it will present at the 41st Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco, CA, on Thursday, January 12, 2023, at 9:00 am PST.
